MaxLineLength:PostgresRoutineDdlHelper.kt$PostgresRoutineDdlHelper$return DdlStatement("-- TODO: Rewrite function ${quoteIdentifier(name)} for PostgreSQL (source dialect: ${fn.sourceDialect})", listOf(action.toNote()))

MaxLineLength:PostgresRoutineDdlHelper.kt$PostgresRoutineDdlHelper$return DdlStatement("-- TODO: Rewrite procedure ${quoteIdentifier(name)} for PostgreSQL (source dialect: ${proc.sourceDialect})", listOf(action.toNote()))

MaxLineLength:PostgresRoutineDdlHelper.kt$PostgresRoutineDdlHelper$return listOf(DdlStatement("-- TODO: Rewrite trigger ${quoteIdentifier(name)} for PostgreSQL (source dialect: ${trigger.sourceDialect})", listOf(action.toNote())))

MaxLineLength:PostgresTypeMapping.kt$PostgresTypeMapping$"numeric", "decimal" -> if (numPrecision != null && numScale != null) MappingResult(NeutralType.Decimal(numPrecision, numScale)) else MappingResult(NeutralType.Float())

MaxLineLength:PostgresTypeMappingTest.kt$PostgresTypeMappingTest$test("composite timestamp") { PostgresTypeMapping.mapCompositeFieldType("timestamp without time zone") shouldBe NeutralType.DateTime(timezone = false) }

MaxLineLength:PostgresTypeMappingTest.kt$PostgresTypeMappingTest$test("composite timestamptz") { PostgresTypeMapping.mapCompositeFieldType("timestamp with time zone") shouldBe NeutralType.DateTime(timezone = true) }

MaxLineLength:PostgresTypeMappingTest.kt$PostgresTypeMappingTest$test("user-defined enum column") { map("user-defined", udtName = "status_type").type shouldBe NeutralType.Enum(refType = "status_type") }
